description: SLI targets and severity mappings for drift detection

decision_divergence.description: Same context_class → different outcomes ratio. SRE pattern: measure divergence over rolling 7-day window.

exception_rate.description: Exceptions per artifact. Baseline 1%, warn at 2%, critical at 5%.

eval_pass_rate.description: Percentage of evals passing. Critical threshold 95%.

trace_coverage.description: Percentage of artifacts with complete trace linkage. Critical threshold 95%.
